flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northern Virginia Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northern Virginia Community College are 35% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($53.6k vs $39.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northern Virginia Community College rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 (12.5% → 15.5%).
